response.global_analysis: The audio phonetically matches 'X-encounter' by Maon Kurosaki. The Reference JSON provided only the beginning lyrics of the song, while the video covers the B-verse, bridge, and final chorus. I discarded the unused beginning lyrics from the JSON and sourced the correct lyrics for the performed segments. Timing is strictly aligned with IRyS's vocal delivery, and the final English speech is included.

subtitles.original: …よう 飛び立つ今 Rainbow
subtitles.english: ...way, taking flight now, Rainbow

subtitles.original: 無性に振り返る 自分の居場所探して
subtitles.english: Obsessively looking back, searching for my place

subtitles.original: 後悔に なぞらえた もろい生 蝕む 夜にいた
subtitles.english: Tracing regrets, in a night eroding a fragile life

subtitles.original: 不器用に 風に揺れて 僕らはまだ 弱いままで
subtitles.english: Swaying awkwardly in the wind, we're still weak

subtitles.original: 迷って 壊れては そうやって続く世界へ
subtitles.english: Getting lost and broken, towards the world that continues

subtitles.original: ただ一つ 見つけたら またたく星を描き進め
subtitles.english: Finding just one thing, draw a twinkling star and move on

subtitles.original: 闇から 覗いた光 手を伸ばして さあ行こう
subtitles.english: A light peeking from the dark, reach out, let's go

subtitles.original: 走り出した この思い ほら鼓動の星が 導いて
subtitles.english: These feelings started running, see, the star of my heart leads

subtitles.original: 染み付いてる 癒えない傷を
subtitles.english: These deep unhealing wounds...

subtitles.original: この翼で 運び出す Rainbow
subtitles.english: I'll carry them on these wings, Rainbow

subtitles.original: I keep holding on 雲を切り
subtitles.english: I keep holding on, cutting through clouds...

subtitles.original: 形のない 涙も蹴散らして
subtitles.english: kicking away formless tears

subtitles.original: 凛とした目に 宿る灯火を 曇らせはしない
subtitles.english: I won't let the light in my dignified eyes be clouded

subtitles.original: 君はそのままでいて
subtitles.english: You, just stay as you are

subtitles.original: 向かい風に逆らい 今 定め羽広げ
subtitles.english: Defying the headwind, now spread the wings of destiny

subtitles.original: 目指そう 僕ら 果てる日まで
subtitles.english: Let's aim, until our days end...

subtitles.original: 共に駆けて行こう Rainbow
subtitles.english: let's run together, Rainbow

subtitles.original: 誰のせいでもない涙 誇りにして さあ行こう
subtitles.english: Make the tears that are no one's fault your pride, let's go

subtitles.original: 走り出す 始まりへ
subtitles.english: Running to the start...

subtitles.original: きっと生まれる前から 決まっていた
subtitles.english: surely decided before we were born

subtitles.original: 羽を揺らし 強く地を蹴って
subtitles.english: Shaking wings, kicking the ground hard...

subtitles.original: 君の元へ 羽ばたこう Rainbow
subtitles.english: let's fly to you, Rainbow

subtitles.original: I keep holding on 何度の後悔のあとに 息づく鼓動
subtitles.english: I keep holding on, after many regrets, a heart beats

subtitles.original: この一瞬が 永遠へ変わる
subtitles.english: This moment turns to eternity...

subtitles.original: 手を繋ぎ 指して 世界を見に行こう
subtitles.english: hold hands, point, let's see the world

subtitles.original: 皮肉にも僕たちは 嘆きより潜り抜けて
subtitles.english: Ironically, we pass through the lamentations...

subtitles.original: 知るんだろう 生存の意味を
subtitles.english: and we'll learn the meaning of survival

subtitles.original: 真実へと 駆けて行こう
subtitles.english: Let's run towards the truth

subtitles.original: 遠回り それは幸福への景色にも
subtitles.english: A detour, even that scenery to happiness...

subtitles.original: 愛を持てた時に
subtitles.english: when we can love...

subtitles.original: 世界はまた 生まれ変わる
subtitles.english: the world will be born again

subtitles.original: Thank you so much for watching the anniversary live!
subtitles.english: Thank you so much for watching the anniversary live!
